description: Create a comprehensive GitHub Actions workflow named CI that triggers on push to main, pull requests, and tag creation. The workflow consists of multiple jobs: lint, build, emscripten, wasi, sanitize, build-wasm2c-memchecked, build-min-cmake, build-rlbox, and build-cross. Each job runs on various environments, including ubuntu-latest, macOS, and Windows, and performs tasks such as setting up Python, checking out code, installing tools, building, testing, and releasing.
